HomePage.name: Miro Mariapori
HomePage.intro: I'm a software engineer focused on full-stack web applications, real-time interactive systems, and 3D/XR tools. I enjoy turning complex ideas into usable, maintainable products, especially in research, healthcare, simulation, and data-driven environments.

whatIDo.title: What I Do
whatIDo.description: My main focus is full-stack development for interactive web applications. I build systems that are easy to use, maintain and extend, from backend APIs and data flows to frontend interfaces, real-time features and 3D visualizations. I also have experience with mobile app development, Unity/XR, game development, automation tools and broader software projects. I like working across the stack and understanding how the pieces fit together.

howIWork.title: How I Work
howIWork.description:
I care about code that is understandable, maintainable and useful in practice. I like building with enough structure to support future changes, while still keeping momentum and shipping working software.

I use AI tools to work faster, explore ideas and reduce repetitive work, but I do not treat them as a replacement for understanding the code. I want to know what I am building, why it works and how to debug it when something goes wrong.

I work well independently, but I also enjoy being part of a team. I like sharing knowledge, helping others and learning from people around me.

experience.title: Experience
experience.description: I have 15 months of professional software engineering experience at Helsinki XR Center, where I worked on full-stack, XR, healthcare and motion-analysis systems, along with several years of freelance development work.

education.title: Education
education.description:
Bachelor of Engineering, Information and Communications Technology

Metropolia University of Applied Sciences | Expected graduation: August 2026

AboutPage.title: About Me
AboutPage.description: I'm a software engineer who enjoys building useful, reliable and well-structured applications. My strongest area is full-stack web development, especially interactive systems with real-time features, 3D/XR interfaces and data-driven functionality. I care about writing code that is understandable, maintainable and built with real users in mind.

ContactPage.title: Contact Me
ContactPage.description: Have a project, opportunity or question? Feel free to reach out. I'm always open to discussing software development, collaboration and new ideas.

general.name: Miro Mariapori
general.title: Software Engineer | Full-stack, XR & Interactive Systems
general.summary: Software engineer focused on full-stack web applications, real-time interactive systems, XR/3D tools, and applied AI. Experienced in building software with live feedback loops, 3D interfaces, and data-driven functionality for healthcare, research, and simulation environments.

description: Developed a full-stack healthcare platform for designing and delivering physiotherapy exercises within an XR-based rehabilitation system
Built and maintained a GraphQL backend supporting real-time communication between XR applications and backend services
Created an interactive web-based 3D exercise editor using a humanoid model for custom physiotherapy movement design
Contributed to Unity-based XR development and implemented browser-based 3D visualizations with Three.js
Designed and implemented a neural-network-based motion analysis system trained on 1000+ physiotherapy exercises, providing intuitive feedback on exercise performance
Implemented authentication and data protection mechanisms for handling sensitive patient-related information
Delivered custom full-stack applications, backend services, and automation tools for client-specific workflows and data processing needs
Developed a Python-based Telegram bot for automated data collection and processing workflows
Built and maintained WordPress-based systems, including custom plugin development and platform customization
Evaluated the relevance and quality of online advertisements against user queries while working in an international quality-assurance environment
Worked in time-sensitive air freight operations, including cargo handling, customs-related workflows, and shipment sorting
Programmed coordinate measuring machines, performed product measurements, and supported client communication and sales-related tasks

projects.name: Autonomous Vehicle Software (Thesis, ongoing)
description: Developing software for an autonomous vehicle system in collaboration with the Finnish Defence Forces
Focusing on real-time and control-related software for autonomous operation, with implementation details limited due to project confidentiality

projects.name: TKIO-Finder
description: Built a full-stack platform improving discoverability of research and innovation projects at Metropolia University of Applied Sciences
Implemented search, filtering, and matchmaking features using React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL
Added Google OAuth2 authentication for secure and user-friendly access
Deployed and maintained backend services in a self-hosted environment, including server-side infrastructure management

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering (BEng) in Information and Communication Technology
